description_long: This is a five-arm chandelier-style sconce suspended from a chain, featuring fabric lampshades with a quilted texture and decorative bows tied around each shade. The central body is composed of a turned column with ornate, curved metal arms extending outward to support each lampshade. The chain and metalwork have a matte, weathered finish, giving the fixture a vintage or rustic appearance. Each lampshade appears to be made of a light-colored fabric, possibly linen or cotton, and is gathered at the top with a ribbon. The overall design is symmetrical, with the arms evenly spaced around the central column. The fixture is intended to be mounted from the ceiling and provides ambient lighting through multiple bulbs.
description: A vintage-style five-arm chandelier sconce with quilted fabric lampshades and decorative bows, suspended from a chain. The fixture features ornate metalwork and a weathered, rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five fabric lampshades with bows and the central column, highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the arms.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the fixture, the curvature of the arms, and the layered arrangement of the lampshades.
description_view_2: Direct overhead view emphasizing the circular symmetry and even spacing of the arms and shades.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the backs of some lampshades and the ornate metalwork supporting them.
attribute_fixture_design: Rustic vintage chandelier with quilted fabric shades, decorative bows, and ornate curved metal arms, evoking a classic and cozy aesthetic.
